---
title: "Software"
---

::: {.section-title}
## Software and decision tools

Tools and reproducible workflows linked to choice modelling, preference research, policy evaluation, and applied economic analysis.
:::

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.card}
### MandEval decision tool
Policy-facing tool translating vaccine mandate preference evidence into predicted support, lives-saved equivalents, and transparent policy comparisons.
:::
::: {.card}
### Choice modelling workflows
MATLAB and Stata workflows for MNL, mixed logit, latent class models, heterogeneity, WTP, elasticities, model comparison, and diagnostics.
:::
::: {.card}
### Eye-tracking DCE workflow
Scripts for attention metrics, transition matrices, temporal attention profiles, choice models, mediation, and attention-augmented preference models.
:::
::: {.card}
### Benefit–cost analysis tools
Web tools and reporting templates for agricultural and health-policy economic evaluation, sensitivity analysis, and professional PDF/Word reports.
:::
:::

::: {.callout}
Add GitHub repository links once individual tools are public or ready for release.
:::
